_comment: Configuration for fetch_dashboard_data.py — update these values annually or when a source changes its URL structure.

ti_cpi._comment: TI publishes in January. Update year and xlsx_url every January. Get the direct xlsx URL from transparency.org/en/cpi — right-click the download button and copy the link. No page scraping — xlsx_url must be set or TI CPI is skipped.

freedom_house._comment: FH publishes in February. Update year to current year after release. URL pattern: {year}-02/All_data_FIW_2013-{year-1}.xlsx

undp._comment: UNDP HDR API version. Update if UNDP changes the endpoint version (v3 → v4 etc.).

un_wpp._comment: UN WPP data window. Shift start/end forward when a new WPP edition is released (every 2 years).

ilo._comment: ILO wage data time range. Extend end_year annually as new data becomes available.

rest_countries._comment: REST Countries API version. Update if the project releases a new major version.

frankfurter._comment: Frankfurter ECB exchange rate API. Free community project — update base_url if it moves.

rsf._comment: RSF Press Freedom Index — published in May. URL pattern: rsf.org/sites/default/files/import_classement/{year}.csv — update year and url each May.

gpi._comment: IEP Global Peace Index — published in June. URL pattern: visionofhumanity.org/wp-content/uploads/{release_year}/06/GPI_{release_year}_{data_year}.csv — for the current-year edition both years are the same (e.g. GPI_2026_2026.csv). Update year and url each June.

wjp._comment: WJP Rule of Law Index — published in October. URL pattern: worldjusticeproject.org/rule-of-law-index/downloads/{year}_wjp_rule_of_law_index_HISTORICAL_DATA_FILE.xlsx — update year and xlsx_url each October.
